elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
Verify the user should be logged in successfully

elements.name: Navigate to Raw Materials list screen

steps.name: verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
verify user navigates to "Raw Materials" list screen

elements.name: Open Add Raw Material popup and verify all fields

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
Raw Material Name field should be visible
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with all fields

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Raw Material Name
Raw Material should be created successfully
newly created Raw Material should be displayed in Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with mandatory fields only

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Raw Material Name
Raw Material should be created successfully
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with trimmed Raw Material Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters Raw Material Name with leading and trailing spaces
system should trim spaces and create Raw Material successfully
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with maximum allowed characters in Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters maximum allowed characters in Raw Material Name
Raw Material should be created successfully
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material without Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User leaves Raw Material Name empty
"This field is required" error should be displayed for Raw Material Name
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material without UOM

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Raw Material Name
"This field is required" error should be displayed for UOM
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Submit Add Raw Material popup without any data

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
"This field is required" error should be displayed for Raw Material Name
validation messages should be displayed below respective fields
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with only spaces in Raw Material Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters only spaces in Raw Material Name field
"This field is required" error should be displayed for Raw Material Name
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with duplicate Name

steps.name: User has already created a Raw Material
User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters existing Raw Material Name
Raw Material should be created successfully
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Create Raw Material with special characters in Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters only special characters in Raw Material Name field
Raw Material should be created successfully
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Verify UOM dropdown options

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
UOM options list should be displayed
User should be able to select one UOM value
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Close Add Raw Material popup with data shows Confirmation Alert

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Raw Material Name
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Close Add Raw Material popup without any data should not show Confirmation Alert

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Rapid multiple Submit clicks should prevent duplicate Raw Material creation

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Raw Material Name
User clicks Submit button multiple times quickly
system should prevent duplicate Raw Material creation
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Reopen popup after close

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
popup should be closed without saving data
User reopens Add Raw Material popup
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Verify Add Raw Material popup UI elements are aligned properly

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
all Add Raw Material fields should be aligned properly
Raw Material Name field should be visible
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Verify Raw Materials list screen UI elements

steps.name: verify user navigates to "Raw Materials" list screen
each Raw Material record should show Raw Material ID
each Raw Material record should show Raw Material Name
each Raw Material record should show Status

elements.name: Verify input field behavior

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
Raw Material Name field should accept valid input
UOM dropdown should show selectable options
Description field should allow optional text
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Verify validation message UI

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
validation messages should be displayed below respective fields
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

elements.name: Validate Description field

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Raw Materials list screen
"Add Raw Material" popup should be displayed
User enters long text in Description field
system should accept optional Description input without error
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving data
User should return to Raw Materials list screen

name: Create Raw Material via Configuration Module
